import { jsx } from "react/jsx-runtime"; import { defineHandlerCallback } from "@tanstack/router-core/ssr/server"; import { renderRouterToString } from "./renderRouterToString.js"; import { RouterServer } from "./RouterServer.js"; const defaultRenderHandler = defineHandlerCallback( ({ router, responseHeaders }) => renderRouterToString({ router, responseHeaders, children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsx(RouterServer, { router }) }) ); export { defaultRenderHandler }; //# sourceMappingURL=defaultRenderHandler.js.map
